name: Apple Sour Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups tart apples, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry.
2. In a bowl, combine the beaten egg, sugars, and sour cream.
3. Stir in the sliced apples and raisins until well mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
5. Place the lattice top on the pie and seal the edges.
6. Flute the edges of the lattice.
7. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 50 minutes, or until fully cooked.
8. Cover the edges with foil during the last 15 minutes of baking time.
